case_title: GREGORY LYNN LITTLE ET AL VS. TURK PARKING GARAGE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY LITTLE, GREGORY LYNN LABALAN, RESURECCION AS TO DEFENDANT TURK PARKING GARAGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-03-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF NO SERVICE FEE SERVED JUL-22-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TURK PARKING GARAGE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) HECTOR CASTRO FILED BY DEFENDANT TURK PARKING GARAGE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-03-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-03-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFFS GREGORY LYNN LITTLE AND RESURECCION LABALAN ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT TURK PARKING GARAGE (HECTOR CASTRO) IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-03-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LITTLE, GREGORY LYNN LABALAN, RESURECCION IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TURK PARKING GARAGE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
